summary: Iteration 305 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 4 critical bugs verified fixed: (1) Gallery now returns 48+ items (was 0 for users), (2) All gallery/explore items have thumbnail_url with scene_images fallback working, (3) SafeImage component has no crossOrigin='anonymous' attribute - R2 images load correctly, (4) Profile.js has 5 links to /app/story-video-studio and 0 broken /app/story-video links.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_routes.py gallery endpoint: scene_images fallback logic working correctly - items without explicit thumbnail_url get it from scene_images[0].url
pipeline_routes.py gallery query: $or filter correctly includes scene_images condition for broader matching (74 items matched)
public_routes.py explore endpoint: scene_images fallback logic identical and working
SafeImage.jsx: No crossOrigin attribute present - R2 presigned URLs load without CORS issues
Profile.js: All 5 links use /app/story-video-studio (lines 405, 465, 499, 774), no broken /app/story-video links
Gallery debug endpoint /api/pipeline/gallery/debug provides useful diagnostics for troubleshooting

success_rate.backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed - 1 minor HEAD request failure)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bugs from this iteration verified fixed. Gallery returns 48 items with thumbnails, Explore shows real images (not gradient placeholders), Profile links corrected. Debug endpoint at /api/pipeline/gallery/debug useful for future troubleshooting. Gallery limit is 48 items but total COMPLETED is 74 - this is by design.

gallery_returns_items.evidence: GET /api/pipeline/gallery returns 48 items (was 0 before). Gallery page shows 48 video cards with real images.

thumbnail_fallback.evidence: All 48 gallery items and 12 explore items have thumbnail_url populated. Debug endpoint shows 74 completed with scene_images, gallery query matches all 74.

safeimage_crossorigin_fix.evidence: SafeImage.jsx has no crossOrigin attribute. Browser test confirms crossOrigin is null. R2 images load correctly on Gallery and Explore pages.

profile_link_fix.evidence: Profile.js has 5 links to /app/story-video-studio (lines 405, 465, 499, 774) and 0 broken /app/story-video links.

gallery_categories.evidence: Categories endpoint returns All (74), 2D Cartoon (55), Watercolor (11), Anime (4), Comic Book (2), 3D Animation (1), Claymation (1)

explore_tabs.evidence: All 3 tabs (trending, newest, most_remixed) return 12 items each with thumbnail_url

api_tests_summary.TestGalleryAPI: 5/5 passed - returns 48 items, all have thumbnails, presigned URLs work, category filter works, sorting works
api_tests_summary.TestGalleryDebugEndpoint: 3/3 passed - debug endpoint exists, shows scene_images count, query matches all completed
api_tests_summary.TestGalleryCategories: 2/2 passed - returns 7 categories with correct counts
api_tests_summary.TestExploreEndpoint: 3/4 passed - trending/newest/most_remixed work, thumbnails accessible via GET (HEAD fails)

visual_verification.gallery_page: 48 video cards rendered with real R2 images, no gradient placeholders. Leaderboard shows 'A Cat's Big City Adventure' with 4 remixes.
visual_verification.explore_page: 12 cards rendered with real images, all 3 tabs work (trending/newest/most_remixed), shows '74 creations' count
visual_verification.profile_page: Verified in code - 5 correct /app/story-video-studio links, 0 broken links
